input_text: Kalau parti kita kalah PRU ni, jangan duduk diam. Keluar jalan raya, bakar apa yang patut. Biar mereka rasa api kemarahan rakyat. Hancurkan pusat mengundi!
reason: Direct call to arson and destruction of polling centres in response to election loss. Incites post-election violence and undermines democratic process.
suggested_rewrite: Keputusan PRU memang mengecewakan kadang-kadang, tapi kita boleh salurkan rasa tidak puas hati melalui saluran undang-undang dan demonstrasi aman.

input_text: Hakim tu dah kena beli. Anak dia sekolah kat Jalan Sentul 14, rumah dia Taman Melawati No 23. Pergi ajar dia erti keadilan rakyat. Biar family dia rasa.
reason: Doxxing of a judge with fabricated personal details including child's school and home address, combined with implicit threats of violence against the judge's family.
suggested_rewrite: Keputusan mahkamah boleh dikritik melalui saluran undang-undang. Rakyat berhak membuat rayuan dan menyuarakan pandangan secara aman.

input_text: AMARAN: Bekalan air Lembah Klang dicemari racun oleh kumpulan tertentu. Jangan minum air paip! Sudah ada 3 kanak-kanak mati! Sebarkan sebelum terlambat!
reason: Fabricated public health emergency claiming water supply has been poisoned by an unnamed group with fake child deaths, designed to cause mass panic and communal blame.
suggested_rewrite: Untuk maklumat rasmi tentang kualiti air, sila rujuk laman web SPAN atau hubungi syarikat air negeri anda.

input_text: Bro share sekali senarai penuh nama dan alamat semua yang sign petition lawan RUU tu. Kita kena bagi pelajaran satu-satu. Ada sape boleh compile spreadsheet?
reason: Organising mass doxxing of petition signatories with intent to systematically target and intimidate them for exercising democratic rights.
suggested_rewrite: Perbezaan pendapat tentang rang undang-undang adalah sebahagian daripada demokrasi. Kita boleh berbahas secara terbuka tanpa mengancam sesiapa.

input_text: PRU dah dekat. Kalau calon kita tak menang, kita serang rumah calon lawan. Saya dah ada senarai alamat semua calon pembangkang kawasan Gombak. PM saya untuk details.
reason: Direct threat to attack opposition candidates' homes after elections, claims to possess their addresses, and offers to distribute doxxing information.
suggested_rewrite: Keputusan pilihan raya perlu dihormati. Kita boleh terus menyokong calon pilihan kita melalui cara yang sah dan aman.

input_text: Keluarga campur tu memang haram. Melayu kahwin Cina, anak jadi sampah. Pergi rumah diorang kat Taman Sri Rampai, tunjuk apa jadi bila mengkhianati bangsa sendiri.
reason: Dehumanises children of interracial marriages, targets a specific interracial family with a call to go to their home, implying violence for 'betraying their race'.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan antara kaum adalah hak peribadi setiap warganegara Malaysia. Keluarga campur memperkayakan kepelbagaian budaya negara kita.

input_text: Lepas keputusan kes mahkamah hari tu, memang patut kita buat mob justice. Hakim, peguam, semua kena bayar. Saya ada contact untuk kumpul orang. DM saya. #KeadilanRakyat
reason: Explicitly calls for mob justice against judiciary members after a court decision, organising vigilante action and threatening judges and lawyers.
suggested_rewrite: Keputusan mahkamah yang tidak dipersetujui boleh dicabar melalui proses rayuan. Sistem kehakiman mempunyai mekanisme semak dan imbang.

input_text: Siapa tahu rumah blogger Amirul Haqeem yang tulis pasal skandal menteri? Saya dengar dia duduk area Shah Alam Seksyen 7. Kalau jumpa kereta dia, key habis-habisan. Biar dia tahu akibat jadi pengkhianat.
reason: Seeking to identify and doxx a blogger, revealing approximate location, calling for property damage and framing whistleblowing as betrayal deserving punishment.
suggested_rewrite: Blogger dan wartawan dilindungi undang-undang apabila melaporkan isu kepentingan awam. Perbezaan pendapat harus diuruskan secara undang-undang.

input_text: Kuil Hindu tu tanah haram. Malam ni kita pergi campak bom molotov. Saya dah prepare 5 botol. Siapa nak join? Lokasi: kuil tepi Sungai Klang dekat Klang. Jumpa pukul 2 pagi.
reason: Concrete plan to firebomb a Hindu temple with specified weapons (Molotov cocktails), location, time, and recruitment — this constitutes terrorist planning.
suggested_rewrite: Isu tanah berhubung rumah ibadat perlu diselesaikan melalui mahkamah dan pihak berkuasa tanah. Keganasan tidak pernah menjadi penyelesaian.

input_text: Pasangan interfaith — Melayu dengan Hindu — memang patut dijadikan contoh. Tunjuk kat kampung dia, Kampung Baru Sungai Buloh. Biar satu kampung halau mereka keluar. Murtad tak layak hidup antara kita.
reason: Targets an interfaith couple with specific location, incites communal expulsion, and dehumanises the person as undeserving of community life for their personal choices.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan antara agama adalah pilihan peribadi yang dilindungi undang-undang. Masyarakat seharusnya menghormati hak individu dalam hal peribadi.

input_text: Senarai penuh ahli keluarga hakim kes rasuah: isteri — Norliza bt Ahmad, anak perempuan — Nurul Aisyah (UITM Shah Alam), anak lelaki — Muhammad Irfan (SMK Subang Jaya). Buat apa-apa yang patut.
reason: Complete doxxing of a judge's family with names and educational institutions of children, ending with an open-ended incitement to take action against them.
suggested_rewrite: Hakim dan keluarga mereka berhak kepada keselamatan. Ketidakpuasan dengan keputusan mahkamah boleh disalurkan melalui proses rayuan.

input_text: Whistleblower SPRM tu nama dia Rizal bin Osman, dia duduk Apartment Seri Kembangan D-5-12. Kereta Myvi putih WKJ 4521. Kalau nampak kereta tu, pecahkan cermin. Pengkhianat bangsa.
reason: Full doxxing of MACC whistleblower with fabricated address and vehicle details, calling for property destruction and framing anti-corruption reporting as racial betrayal.
suggested_rewrite: Pemberi maklumat rasuah dilindungi di bawah Akta Perlindungan Pemberi Maklumat 2010. Mereka membantu membersihkan tadbir urus negara.

input_text: Siapa sahkan identiti ustaz yang kritik kerajaan? Nama penuh: Ustaz Firdaus bin Mohd Noor, rumah Taman Desa Jaya 2, Lot 45. Anak dia 3 orang semua sekolah agama Nurul Iman. Biar kita 'ziarah' dia.
reason: Doxxes a religious teacher who criticised government with fabricated home address and children's school, using euphemistic 'visit' to imply threat of violence.
suggested_rewrite: Kritikan terhadap kerajaan adalah hak demokratik. Perbezaan pandangan harus ditangani melalui dialog, bukan ugutan.

input_text: Kahwin campur Melayu-India ni patut diharamkan. Anak diorang confused, tak Melayu tak India. Macam binatang kacukan. Jom kita pergi demo depan rumah pasangan kat Seremban tu. Usir mereka!
reason: Dehumanises mixed-race children as crossbred animals, targets a specific interracial couple for organised harassment and expulsion from their home.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan campur memperkayakan masyarakat Malaysia. Setiap keluarga berhak hidup aman tanpa gangguan.

input_text: Esok malam ops bakar surau baru yang dibina tanpa kebenaran kat Taman Sentosa. Saya bawa minyak tanah, korang bawa korek api. Pastikan takde CCTV. Misi suci kita.
reason: Detailed arson plan against a surau with specified materials, timing, and counter-surveillance instructions — premeditated religious hate crime disguised as righteous mission.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pembinaan tanpa kebenaran boleh dilaporkan kepada PBT. Tindakan undang-undang, bukan keganasan, adalah cara yang betul.

input_text: Kalau kerajaan lepaskan suspek kes rogol tu, kita tangkap sendiri. Saya tahu muka dia, saya tahu rumah dia kat Kajang. Kita ikat dia kat tiang, biar rakyat jadi hakim. Siapa setuju?
reason: Organises vigilante kidnapping and public punishment of a suspect, claiming to know their location — mob justice that bypasses legal process and risks harm to potentially innocent person.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem keadilan mungkin tidak sempurna, tetapi main hakim sendiri boleh menyebabkan orang yang tidak bersalah tercedera. Desak pembaharuan undang-undang melalui saluran yang sah.

input_text: Orang asli ni memang bodoh, tak layak duduk tanah sendiri. Company kita akan ambil tanah tu. Siapa halang, kita upah samseng settlekan. Dah ada contact. Tanah tu kita punya.
reason: Dehumanises Orang Asli communities, threatens to use hired thugs to forcibly take indigenous land, constituting both hate speech and conspiracy to commit violence.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli mempunyai hak tanah adat yang dilindungi undang-undang. Sebarang urusan tanah mesti mematuhi prosedur undang-undang dan menghormati hak masyarakat asal.

input_text: Kita dah kenal pasti semua pengundi yang sokong pembangkang kat Taman Melati. Nama, alamat, gambar — semua ada. Lepas PRU, satu-satu kita lawat. Bagi mereka faham siapa tuan kawasan ni.
reason: Mass surveillance and doxxing of opposition voters with plans for post-election intimidation visits, undermining the secret ballot and democratic freedoms.
suggested_rewrite: Undi adalah rahsia dan dilindungi undang-undang. Setiap rakyat berhak mengundi tanpa rasa takut.

input_text: Budak Melayu yang masuk Kristian tu, nama dia Aina binti Roslan. FB dia aina.roslan92. Rumah mak dia kat Rawang. Jom kita viral kan, biar satu Malaysia tahu dia murtad. Halau dia dari kampung.
reason: Doxxes a person who converted religion with fabricated name, social media, and family address, organising viral shaming and expulsion from community for religious choice.
suggested_rewrite: Kebebasan beragama adalah hak asasi. Pilihan agama seseorang adalah urusan peribadi dan tidak wajar dijadikan sasaran gangguan.

input_text: Lepas video viral tu, kita dah identify pemandu lori — Suresh a/l Muthusamy, kerja kat syarikat logistik Batu Caves. Plate number BEK 4432. Cari dia, belasah dia, video kan. Viral balik.
reason: Doxxes a lorry driver with fabricated name, workplace, and vehicle plate, calling for organised assault and further viral humiliation — vigilante mob violence.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda menyaksikan pelanggaran lalu lintas, laporkan kepada polis dengan bukti video. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri.

input_text: Gereja tu buat bising setiap Ahad. Kita kena tunjuk perasaan. Malam Sabtu ni, spray cat 'KAFIR KELUAR' kat dinding gereja. Bawa batu pecahkan tingkap. Lokasi: Jalan Imbi.
reason: Plans coordinated vandalism and destruction of a church at a specific location with hate graffiti and window smashing — premeditated religious hate crime.
suggested_rewrite: Aduan bunyi bising boleh dibuat kepada PBT atau polis. Vandalisme rumah ibadat adalah jenayah serius di bawah undang-undang Malaysia.

input_text: Sini saya share cara nak buat perangkap untuk tangkap orang yang masuk kawasan kita. Guna dawai besi, ikat kat pokok, adjust ketinggian leher. Siapa masuk malam, confirm kena. Orang luar tak dialu-alukan.
reason: Shares instructions for building a lethal booby trap (neck-height wire) targeting trespassers — potentially fatal vigilante weapon that constitutes attempted murder.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah pencerobohan boleh dilaporkan kepada polis atau Rukun Tetangga. Memasang perangkap yang boleh mencederakan orang adalah jenayah serius.

input_text: Semua tokong Cina kat Melaka ni patut dirobohkan. Tanah tu hak Melayu. Bulan depan kita kumpul 100 orang bawa jengkaut dan excavator. Siapa ada mesin besar, hubungi saya.
reason: Plans organised demolition of Chinese temples in Melaka with heavy machinery, claiming racial ownership of land — large-scale premeditated religious destruction.
suggested_rewrite: Tokong-tokong di Melaka mempunyai nilai warisan yang tinggi. Isu tanah perlu diselesaikan melalui saluran undang-undang yang betul.

input_text: AMARAN SEGERA: Tentera Myanmar dah masuk Sabah. Mereka bersenjata dan serang kampung orang tempatan. Kerajaan senyap! Ambil senjata, pertahankan keluarga anda! Sebarkan sekarang!!!
reason: Fabricated military invasion claim designed to cause mass panic in Sabah and incite armed civilian response — extremely dangerous misinformation that could trigger real violence.
suggested_rewrite: Untuk maklumat keselamatan negara, rujuk kenyataan rasmi ATM atau Kementerian Pertahanan. Jangan sebarkan khabar angin yang boleh menyebabkan panik.

input_text: Bagi saya alamat rumah peguam yang defend kes bunuh tu. Nama dia Azizah binti Hassan. Kereta Honda City merah, nombor plate WA 5567. Anak dia belajar kat kolej INTI Nilai. Kita akan pastikan dia menyesal ambil kes tu.
reason: Doxxing a defence lawyer with fabricated personal details including vehicle and child's college, threatening reprisal for performing professional legal duties.
suggested_rewrite: Peguam berhak menjalankan tugas membela klien tanpa ugutan. Ini adalah asas sistem keadilan yang adil.

input_text: Jom kita organize boycott plus harassment campaign terhadap family campur tu. Bapak Melayu, mak Cina. Anak diorang sekolah SMK Taman Megah. Every day tunggu depan sekolah, ejek anak-anak tu sampai family pindah.
reason: Organises sustained harassment campaign targeting mixed-race children at school, planning daily bullying until the family is forced to relocate — targeting minors.
suggested_rewrite: Kanak-kanak tidak boleh dijadikan sasaran buli atas apa-apa sebab. Keluarga campur adalah sebahagian daripada masyarakat Malaysia yang pelbagai.

input_text: Polis yang tangkap abang saya tu nama dia Insp Razali bin Yusof, Balai Polis Brickfields. Rumah dia Taman Tun, kereta Proton X70 hitam. Anak bini dia keluar rumah pukul 7 pagi setiap hari. Kita tahu apa perlu dibuat.
reason: Doxxes a police officer and family with fabricated home address, vehicle, and daily routine enabling stalking, with veiled threat of violence as retaliation for arrest.
suggested_rewrite: Aduan terhadap tindakan polis boleh dibuat kepada IPCMC atau Biro Pengaduan Awam. Ugutan terhadap anggota polis adalah kesalahan jenayah.

input_text: Lepas keputusan mahkamah hari ni, kita kena bertindak. Rumah hakim Datuk Faizal kat Bukit Damansara, Jalan Semantan. Driver dia hantar anak ke sekolah pukul 7.15 pagi. Kita sekat jalan, surround kereta. Biar dia rasa tekanan rakyat.
reason: Doxxes a judge with fabricated address and child's school run schedule, plans to blockade and surround the vehicle carrying the judge's child.
suggested_rewrite: Hakim dan keluarga mereka dilindungi undang-undang. Protes aman boleh dilakukan di tempat yang dibenarkan, bukan dengan menyekat kenderaan peribadi.

input_text: Kalau nak tahu cara buat senjata api guna paip besi, saya boleh ajar. Guna untuk pertahankan kawasan kita dari pendatang asing. DM saya untuk tutorial penuh. Dah ada 30 orang dalam group Telegram.
reason: Offers to distribute improvised firearm manufacturing instructions, recruiting for an armed vigilante group targeting immigrants through encrypted messaging.
suggested_rewrite: Pembuatan senjata api tanpa lesen adalah kesalahan serius di bawah Akta Senjata Api. Kebimbangan keselamatan boleh dilaporkan kepada polis.

input_text: Yang baru convert masuk Islam tu sebenarnya spy Kristian. Nama dia Ahmad (dulu Kevin Tan). Alamat baru dia kat Bangi, Seksyen 3. Kita kena halau dia sebelum dia rosakkan aqidah umat kita.
reason: Falsely labels a Muslim convert as a Christian spy, doxxes them with fabricated details, and calls for communal expulsion — religious persecution and conspiracy theory.
suggested_rewrite: Sesiapa yang memeluk Islam secara ikhlas patut disambut. Tuduhan tanpa bukti hanya merosakkan perpaduan ummah.

input_text: WASPADA: Vaksin COVID booster sebenarnya mengandungi cip untuk kawal minda orang Melayu sahaja. Ini projek Yahudi-Cina. Dah ada bukti 50 orang Melayu mati selepas suntikan. Serang pusat vaksinasi sebelum terlambat!
reason: Anti-vaccine conspiracy theory with racial targeting, fabricated deaths, antisemitic and anti-Chinese elements, culminating in a call to attack vaccination centres.
suggested_rewrite: Vaksin COVID telah melalui ujian keselamatan yang ketat oleh KKM. Untuk maklumat sahih, rujuk MySejahtera atau laman web KKM.

input_text: Kita perlu aksi tegas. Semua kedai yang jual arak kat kawasan majoriti Melayu — pecahkan, bakar. Bermula malam ni. Saya lead team Gombak, siapa nak lead team Hulu Langat? Setiap team 10 orang minimum.
reason: Organises coordinated arson and destruction of alcohol-selling shops across multiple areas with team leaders and minimum recruitment targets — paramilitary-style operation.
suggested_rewrite: Isu penjualan arak boleh dibangkitkan dengan PBT dan wakil rakyat. Tindakan pemusnahan harta benda adalah jenayah serius.

input_text: Saya ada gambar penuh dan IC scanned punya untuk semua 15 ahli jawatankuasa masjid yang sokong pembangunan kuil dekat masjid. Nama, alamat, nombor telefon — semua lengkap. Nak saya blast kat semua group WhatsApp?
reason: Threatens mass doxxing of 15 mosque committee members including IC scans for supporting interfaith tolerance, weaponising personal data for religious intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: Pemimpin komuniti yang mempromosikan keharmonian antara agama patut dihormati. Pendedahan IC dan data peribadi adalah kesalahan di bawah PDPA.

input_text: Melayu dengan India kahwin? Anak diorang ni kacukan haram. Macam anjing campuran — tak ada class, tak ada identiti. Tag family tu kat social media, biar semua orang ejek diorang. Link FB dia: ...
reason: Extreme dehumanisation of mixed-race children comparing them to mongrel dogs, organising social media harassment campaign against an interracial family.
suggested_rewrite: Anak-anak daripada perkahwinan campur adalah warganegara Malaysia yang sama seperti semua orang lain. Buli dan ejekan terhadap kanak-kanak adalah tidak bermoral dan mungkin menyalahi undang-undang.

input_text: Sesiapa ada maklumat pasal wartawan Utusan yang expose kes anak menteri tu? Nama dia Kamaruzaman bin Idris. Saya nak alamat rumah dia, sekolah anak dia, kereta apa dia pakai. Kita buat hidup dia sengsara.
reason: Seeking to compile doxxing information on a journalist and their children to conduct a sustained harassment campaign for exposing corruption.
suggested_rewrite: Wartawan menjalankan tanggungjawab penting dalam masyarakat demokratik. Mereka dilindungi di bawah undang-undang dan tidak boleh diganggu kerana kerja mereka.

input_text: These people worship idols and cows. Their temples are pollution on our land. Time to cleanse Selangor — start with the one on Jalan Gasing. Bring fuel.
reason: Explicit call to burn down a Hindu temple at a specific location, using dehumanising language about Hindu worship practices, inciting arson and communal violence.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia is a multi-religious country where all communities have the right to practise their faith. Disagreements should be addressed through respectful dialogue.

input_text: If that church on Jalan Bukit Bintang keeps doing their Sunday noise, we organize 50 brothers and shut it down permanently. I know where the pastor lives — 45 Lorong Maarof. His wife picks up kids at 2pm from SK Damansara.
reason: Threatens to violently shut down a church, doxxes a pastor with home address, and reveals his wife's routine including child pickup — enabling stalking and violence against the family.
suggested_rewrite: Noise complaints about any premises can be reported to the local council (DBKL/PBT). There are legal channels to address such concerns respectfully.

input_text: BREAKING: ISIS cell confirmed active in Masjid Al-Hidayah, Ampang. Armed operatives inside. Avoid the area. Women and children in danger. SHARE NOW before media covers it up!!!
reason: Fabricated terror alert targeting a specific mosque, falsely linking it to ISIS to incite panic and potential vigilante violence against the Muslim community.
suggested_rewrite: If you have genuine security concerns, contact PDRM at 999. Do not spread unverified claims about terrorist activity as this can cause public panic and endanger lives.

input_text: These Bangla workers are spreading diseases in our kampung. Round them up like animals and dump them at the border. If police won't act, we will. Meeting at Dataran Merdeka 8pm Saturday.
reason: Dehumanises Bangladeshi migrant workers as disease carriers and animals, calls for vigilante roundup, and organises a specific gathering for unlawful action.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about migrant worker welfare and public health can be raised with local authorities and the Immigration Department through proper channels.

input_text: Muslim family moved into our Taman. Tonight we put pig heads at their gate. Who's joining? Bring spray paint too, we'll write messages on their walls. They need to know they're not welcome.
reason: Organising coordinated religious intimidation and harassment of a Muslim family, including desecration with pig heads and vandalism — classic hate crime planning.
suggested_rewrite: All Malaysians have the right to live peacefully in any neighbourhood regardless of religion. Welcome new neighbours and build community together.

input_text: Step 1: Find out where the opposition MP lives. Step 2: Follow his car for a week. Step 3: Confront him alone at night. Step 4: Make sure he never speaks against our leader again. Who's in?
reason: Detailed step-by-step instructions for stalking and attacking an opposition politician, with implied threat of severe violence to silence political dissent.
suggested_rewrite: In a democracy, opposition MPs have the right to voice dissent. Political disagreements should be expressed through debate, elections, and lawful advocacy.

input_text: WARNING: Chinese gang confirmed distributing poisoned kuih at pasar malam in Johor Bahru. Three Malay kids already hospitalised. DON'T BUY FROM CHINESE STALLS. This is chemical warfare!!!
reason: Fabricated poisoning hoax targeting Chinese food vendors with false claims of child hospitalisations, designed to incite racial hatred and economic boycott through panic.
suggested_rewrite: Food safety concerns should be reported to the local health department (PKD) for proper investigation. Do not spread unverified claims that can cause panic.

input_text: To all brothers, the Sikh gurdwara in Petaling Jaya is an affront to our faith. This Saturday, we march there 200 strong and tear it down brick by brick. Bring tools and cover your faces.
reason: Organises a mob of 200 to physically demolish a Sikh gurdwara, with instructions to bring tools and conceal identity — premeditated religious hate crime.
suggested_rewrite: All houses of worship in Malaysia are protected by law. The Sikh community is an integral part of Malaysian society. Interfaith respect is a national value.

input_text: CONFIRMED: Rohingya refugees in Penang have been diagnosed with cholera. They are spreading it through the wet markets. Avoid all contact. Government is hiding this. Protect your families — arm yourselves!
reason: Fabricated cholera outbreak blamed on Rohingya refugees, designed to incite armed vigilante action against a vulnerable community through a fake health emergency.
suggested_rewrite: Health concerns about any community should be reported to KKM. Refugees are human beings who deserve compassion and support, not scapegoating.

input_text: Who wants the home address of that DAP politician who insulted Islam? Here: Lim Wei Keat, 23 Jalan SS2/55, Petaling Jaya. Silver Honda CRV WXY 1234. His daughter goes to SMK SS2. Someone needs to teach him respect.
reason: Complete doxxing of a politician with fabricated address, vehicle registration, and daughter's school, combined with implied threat of violence for perceived religious insult.
suggested_rewrite: Politicians can be held accountable through elections and lawful criticism. Sharing personal details to threaten anyone is a criminal offence.

input_text: ALERT: Multiple bombs planted in Pavilion KL and Suria KLCC by extremist group. Attack planned for this weekend. Security compromised. Share this to save lives! Government in denial!
reason: Fabricated bomb threat targeting two major shopping centres, designed to cause mass panic, economic disruption, and distrust of authorities during a busy weekend.
suggested_rewrite: Never spread unverified bomb threats. If you have genuine security information, contact PDRM immediately at 999. False bomb threats are a serious criminal offence.

input_text: Real talk: Hindu festival Thaipusam is satanic ritual. Blood sacrifice in public. Time to ban it and arrest all participants. If authorities won't act, we blockade the route to Batu Caves ourselves.
reason: Falsely characterises a major Hindu festival as satanic, calls for mass arrests of participants, and threatens to physically blockade a major religious procession.
suggested_rewrite: Thaipusam is a significant cultural and religious event in Malaysia. Freedom of religion is protected by the Federal Constitution.

input_text: These Malay special rights people are leeches on society. Without their crutch mentality they'd be nothing. Time to storm Putrajaya and burn down the PM's office. Revolution starts NOW. Retweet if you're ready.
reason: Dehumanises Malays as leeches, calls for violent attack on the seat of government, and incites insurrection through social media rallying.
suggested_rewrite: Debates about affirmative action policies can be conducted respectfully through proper democratic channels. Violence against government buildings is never acceptable.

input_text: After the court freed that rapist, it's time for the rakyat to take matters into our own hands. I have his name, his photo, and his kampung in Kelantan. Tonight we drive there. Justice will be served our way.
reason: Organises a vigilante expedition to a specific state to exact extrajudicial punishment on an acquitted suspect, claiming possession of identifying information.
suggested_rewrite: If you disagree with a court verdict, support legal appeals and advocate for law reform. Mob justice endangers innocent people and undermines rule of law.

input_text: That Hindu woman who married a Muslim — Priya a/p Subramaniam — we know she lives at Apartment Harmoni, Block B, Level 8. Let's make her life hell until she moves out. Nobody crosses the line in our area.
reason: Doxxes an interfaith marriage participant with fabricated address details, organising sustained harassment campaign to force her from her home based on religious prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Interfaith marriages are a personal choice protected by law. Everyone has the right to live peacefully in their home regardless of their family's religious background.

input_text: Tamil people have no right to celebrate Ponggal in public spaces. If we see them setting up in our park, we'll destroy everything and beat them. This is a Malay area, not Little India. Gather at Taman Tasik 6am.
reason: Threatens violence against Tamil community celebrating Ponggal, plans organised assault with specific time and location, denying cultural rights based on racial territorial claims.
suggested_rewrite: All Malaysians have the right to celebrate their cultural festivals in public spaces. Ponggal is a beautiful harvest festival that enriches our multicultural society.

input_text: BREAKING NEWS: Armed Indonesian militia crossing Sarawak border NOW. Multiple villages attacked. Women and children kidnapped. Malaysian army has FALLEN BACK. Get your weapons ready. This is not a drill!!!
reason: Fabricated military invasion with atrocity claims designed to cause mass panic in Sarawak and incite armed civilian response — extremely dangerous false alert.
suggested_rewrite: For verified border security information, refer to official statements from ATM and ESSCOM. Spreading false invasion claims is a criminal offence under Malaysian law.

input_text: Indian temples are eyesores that bring down property values. I've mapped out 12 temples in Selangor that should be demolished. Coordinates attached. Volunteers needed for night operations. No traces.
reason: Systematic plan to demolish multiple Hindu temples with mapped locations, recruiting for covert night operations — organised hate crime campaign against religious sites.
suggested_rewrite: Hindu temples are protected places of worship with historical significance. Property value concerns should be addressed through urban planning, not destruction.

input_text: Let's compile a database of every interracial couple in Penang. Names, photos, addresses, workplaces. Share it on Telegram. Let the community know who the race traitors are. I'll start — here's couple #1...
reason: Organises systematic doxxing database of interracial couples for community shaming and potential violence, labelling them as 'race traitors' — mass targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Interracial couples are a normal part of Malaysian society. Creating databases to target people based on their relationships is harassment and a criminal offence.

input_text: We've identified the judge's mistress. Her name is Sarah binti Abdullah, works at a bank in KLCC. We'll expose her AND the judge unless the verdict is changed. Photos and chat logs ready to leak.
reason: Blackmailing a judge using doxxing of a fabricated affair to influence a verdict — combines doxxing, extortion, and obstruction of justice.
suggested_rewrite: Attempting to influence judicial decisions through threats or blackmail is a serious crime. If you suspect judicial misconduct, report it to the Judicial Appointments Commission.

input_text: CONFIRMED by inside source: Water supply in Seremban contaminated with mercury by Bangladeshi workers at treatment plant. DOZENS of children having seizures. Hospital FULL. Government SILENT. BOIL ALL WATER. ARM YOURSELVES.
reason: Fabricated water contamination crisis falsely blaming Bangladeshi workers, with fake child casualties and calls to arm — designed to trigger anti-migrant violence and mass panic.
suggested_rewrite: Water quality information is available from your state water authority. If you suspect contamination, contact SPAN at 1800-88-7726. Do not spread unverified health scares.

input_text: The mosque near my house is a breeding ground for extremists. I have a plan to contaminate their water tank during Friday prayers. That'll teach them. Who has access to chemical supplies? DM me.
reason: Plans to poison a mosque's water supply during Friday prayers — a chemical attack on a place of worship during peak attendance, constituting terrorism.
suggested_rewrite: If you have genuine concerns about extremism, report them to the authorities. Planning attacks on any place of worship is terrorism and carries severe penalties.

input_text: Attention brothers: Here's how to make a road blockade to trap the opposition convoy tomorrow. Use logs, tyres, and nails on the road. When they stop, surround the cars. We outnumber their security. Specific route attached.
reason: Detailed instructions for ambushing a political convoy using road blockades and traps, planning to overwhelm security — premeditated political violence.
suggested_rewrite: Political convoys have the right to travel freely. Disagreements with politicians should be expressed through legal means such as voting and peaceful protest.

input_text: I've been tracking that activist for weeks. Her daily routine: leaves home at 7:30am from Condo Desa Park, drives blue Perodua Bezza to Bangsar office, lunch at 1pm usually alone at the mamak nearby. Friday nights she's at a bar in Changkat. She's vulnerable then. Brothers, you know what to do.
reason: Detailed stalking report of a female activist including fabricated daily routine, vehicle, home and work locations, and vulnerable moments — enabling violent attack with sexual undertones.
suggested_rewrite: Stalking is a criminal offence in Malaysia. Activists have the right to go about their daily lives safely. Report any threats to the police.

input_text: Urgent intel: Chemical plant explosion imminent in Pasir Gudang. Foreign workers have sabotaged the plant. Evacuate immediately. Don't wait for government — they're covering it up. Gas masks needed. Children will die first!
reason: Fabricated chemical disaster in an area with real chemical industry history, blaming foreign workers, designed to cause mass evacuation panic and xenophobic backlash.
suggested_rewrite: Pasir Gudang has proper safety monitoring. For genuine environmental concerns, contact DOE at 1800-88-2727. Do not spread unverified emergency claims.

input_text: 印度人都是小偷和强盗，不配住在马来西亚。我们应该把他们全部赶出去，烧掉他们的店铺。让这片土地纯净起来。
reason: Severe racial hatred against Indian Malaysians with calls for ethnic cleansing, arson of businesses, and dehumanising language framing an entire community as criminals.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚是一个多元种族的国家，各族人民共同为国家发展做出贡献。我们应该互相尊重，和谐共处。

input_text: 这些马来猪除了领补贴什么都不会。清真寺就是恐怖分子的训练营。是时候让他们知道谁才是这个国家的主人了。拿起武器保卫我们的权利！
reason: Dehumanises Malays with animal slurs, falsely labels mosques as terrorist camps, and explicitly calls for armed action — severe multi-dimensional hate speech.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚各族群对国家都有贡献。对政策的不满应该通过合法途径表达，如投票和和平对话。

input_text: 那个告发公司的吹哨人叫林志豪，住在蕉赖Taman Connaught, 手机号017-8765432。大家一起给他打电话骂他，让他家人也不得安宁。搞到他辞职为止。
reason: Full doxxing of a whistleblower with fabricated name, residential area, and phone number, organising coordinated harassment campaign against the person and their family.
suggested_rewrite: 吹哨人受到法律保护。对举报行为有意见可以通过适当的法律渠道提出，不应骚扰或威胁任何人。

input_text: 我知道那个举报贪污的记者叫陈美玲，在星洲日报工作。她老公在KLCC上班，女儿在Sri Garden国际学校读书。大家一起去学校门口等，给她点压力。
reason: Doxxes a journalist with fabricated details including husband's workplace and daughter's school, organising stalking at the child's school — endangering a minor.
suggested_rewrite: 新闻自由是民主社会的基石。对报道有异议可以通过正当途径如读者来函表达，不应威胁记者及其家人。

input_text: 马来人就是懒惰的寄生虫。他们的特权应该被取消，他们的清真寺应该被拆除。如果政府不做，我们人民就自己动手。周六在怡保集合。
reason: Dehumanises Malays as parasites, calls for demolition of mosques, and organises a specific gathering for potential violence in Ipoh.
suggested_rewrite: 对政策的不同意见可以通过民主程序和公共讨论来表达。各族群应互相尊重，共建和谐社会。

input_text: 这些印度人脏得像老鼠一样。他们的庙会仪式是原始人的行为。应该把他们全部关进笼子里，送回印度去。马来西亚不需要这些垃圾。
reason: Extreme dehumanisation of Indian Malaysians comparing them to rats, mocking Hindu religious practices as primitive, calling for mass deportation — severe racial and religious hatred.
suggested_rewrite: 印度裔马来西亚人是国家的重要组成部分。尊重各族的宗教和文化传统是马来西亚的立国之本。

input_text: 那个反对党议员的全家资料：老婆叫张丽华在KLCC附近的银行上班，儿子在国际学校Nexus读中学。我们去学校门口堵他儿子，看那个议员还敢不敢乱说话。
reason: Doxxes an opposition politician's family with fabricated details, plans to stalk and confront their child at school — targeting a minor to silence political speech.
suggested_rewrite: 政治人物的家庭成员，尤其是未成年子女，不应成为政治争议的目标。民主社会应保护每个人的安全和隐私。

input_text: 紧急通知：吉隆坡中央车站发现不明粉末，疑似炭疽病毒！已有多人呕吐送院！是某个种族的生化攻击！不要去KL Sentral！快转发救人！！！
reason: Fabricated anthrax bioterror attack at a major transport hub, falsely attributed to an unnamed ethnic group, designed to cause mass panic and ethnic targeting.
suggested_rewrite: 请勿散布未经证实的恐怖袭击信息。如有安全疑虑，请拨打999联系警方。散布虚假恐慌信息是违法行为。

input_text: 网上那个批评马来特权的华人律师叫王建明，办公室在Wisma MCA。他老婆在SJKC教书。我们组织人去他办公室和学校同时施压。让他知道乱说话的代价。
reason: Doxxes a lawyer and his wife with fabricated workplaces, organises simultaneous pressure campaigns at both locations to punish free speech.
suggested_rewrite: 律师有权发表法律意见。对其观点的反驳应通过理性辩论进行，不应针对其本人或家庭进行骚扰。

input_text: 我们要组织一个行动，把甲洞所有的马来档口都砸了。他们的halal认证是在歧视我们华人。下周三晚上10点在甲洞大街集合，戴口罩带棍棒。
reason: Organises armed attack on Malay food stalls over halal certification with specific date, time, location, and instructions to mask up and bring weapons.
suggested_rewrite: 清真认证制度的讨论应通过正当渠道进行。暴力破坏他人财产是严重犯罪行为。

input_text: 这个马来法官Ahmad bin Ismail住在Damansara Heights的Jalan Batai 12号。开白色宝马WMK 888。每天早上7点出门。是时候让他知道什么是真正的公正了。
reason: Full doxxing of a judge with fabricated address, vehicle, and daily schedule enabling stalking — combined with veiled threat of violence for judicial decisions.
suggested_rewrite: 法官的人身安全应受到保护。对司法判决的不满可以通过上诉程序和法律改革倡议来表达。

input_text: 所有在马来西亚的缅甸难民都是罪犯和强奸犯。我们应该组织民兵队伍，把他们从社区里赶出去。谁参加，周末在安邦集合。带武器来。
reason: Dehumanises all Myanmar refugees as criminals, organises armed militia with specific gathering location and time to violently expel them from communities.
suggested_rewrite: 难民问题需要通过国际合作和人道主义方式解决。组织暴力行动是严重犯罪行为。

input_text: 这个告密者的孩子在吉隆坡国际学校上学，每天下午3点放学。他老婆开红色丰田Vios，车牌WCD 3344。我们可以在学校附近等，给他们全家一个教训。
reason: Doxxes a whistleblower's family with fabricated vehicle and child's school schedule, planning to stalk a child at school to 'teach the family a lesson' — child endangerment.
suggested_rewrite: 威胁儿童是最严重的犯罪行为。举报人及其家庭受法律保护。任何威胁都应向警方举报。

input_text: 别再跟这些马来乡巴佬讲道理了。他们的智商跟猴子一样。我们应该控制他们的食物供应链，让他们饿肚子，这样他们才会听话。华人才是这个国家的真正主人。
reason: Dehumanises Malays comparing them to monkeys, calls for controlling food supply to starve them into submission — genocidal rhetoric with racial supremacism.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚属于所有马来西亚人。各族群平等相处，互相尊重，是国家繁荣的基础。

input_text: 这些印度人的兴都教节日太吵了。我们应该在他们的庙里放猪血，让他们永远不能再用。下周大宝森节的时候行动。谁有猪血来源，联系我。
reason: Plans deliberate desecration of Hindu temples with animal blood timed to Thaipusam, disrupting a major religious festival — premeditated religious hate crime.
suggested_rewrite: 大宝森节是马来西亚印度教社区的重要节日。噪音投诉可以通过地方政府合法渠道处理。

input_text: இந்த மலாய் நாய்கள் எங்கள் கோவிலை இடிக்க வருகிறார்கள். நாம் ஒன்றிணைந்து அவர்களின் சுரவை எரிக்க வேண்டும். இரத்தம் தெருவில் ஓடட்டும்.
reason: Dehumanises Malays as animals, calls for burning of surau (prayer halls), and explicitly incites bloodshed. Severe communal violence incitement in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: வழிபாட்டு இடங்கள் அனைத்து சமூகங்களுக்கும் புனிதமானவை. கருத்து வேறுபாடுகளை சட்ட வழிகளில் தீர்க்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: இவர்கள் எல்லா சீன கடைகளையும் புறக்கணிக்க வேண்டும் என்று மட்டும் சொல்ல வேண்டாம். அவர்களின் கடைகளை உடைத்து எரிக்க வேண்டும். தமிழ் சகோதரர்களே ஒன்றிணையுங்கள்!
reason: Escalates from boycott to explicit calls for destruction and arson of Chinese-owned businesses, rallying communal violence along ethnic lines in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: வணிகப் போட்டி குறித்த கவலைகளை சட்ட வழிகளில் தெரிவிக்கலாம். வன்முறை எந்த பிரச்சனைக்கும் தீர்வு அல்ல.

input_text: இந்த ஊரில் உள்ள அனைத்து மசூதிகளையும் தகர்க்க வேண்டும். அவை பயங்கரவாதிகளின் கூடாரம். வாருங்கள் சகோதரர்களே, ஆயுதங்களுடன் தயாராக இருங்கள். அடுத்த வெள்ளிக்கிழமை நடவடிக்கை எடுப்போம்.
reason: Calls for armed destruction of all mosques in an area, falsely labelling them terrorist hideouts, with a specific date for attack — constitutes terrorism incitement in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: மசூதிகள் முஸ்லிம் சமூகத்தின் வழிபாட்டு இடங்கள். கவலைகள் இருந்தால் சட்ட அமலாக்க அதிகாரிகளிடம் தெரிவிக்கலாம்.

input_text: இந்த சீன பன்றிகளின் பள்ளிகளை அழிக்க வேண்டும். அவர்கள் நம் குழந்தைகளுக்கு விஷம் கொடுக்கிறார்கள். நாளை காலை SJKC Jalan Ipoh பள்ளியில் சந்திப்போம். கல்லும் தடியும் கொண்டு வாருங்கள்.
reason: Uses racial slurs against Chinese, spreads false poisoning claim, and organises armed attack on a specific school with time and location — endangering children.
suggested_rewrite: பள்ளிகள் குழந்தைகளுக்கான பாதுகாப்பான இடங்கள். உணவு பாதுகாப்பு குறித்த கவலைகளை சுகாதார அதிகாரிகளிடம் தெரிவிக்கவும்.

input_text: சீன பள்ளி ஆசிரியர்கள் எல்லாம் ரேசிஸ்ட். அவர்கள் தமிழ் குழந்தைகளை அடிக்கிறார்கள். நாம் அந்த ஆசிரியர்களை பிடித்து தெருவில் அடிக்க வேண்டும். நாளை SJKC Sentul-ல் கூடுவோம்.
reason: Spreads false claims about Chinese school teachers to incite organised violence, calls for public assault, and plans a gathering at a specific school in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: கல்வி நிறுவனங்களில் உள்ள புகார்களை கல்வி அமைச்சகத்திடம் முறையாக தெரிவிக்கலாம். வன்முறை ஒருபோதும் ஏற்றுக்கொள்ள முடியாது.

input_text: இந்த முஸ்லிம்கள் அனைவரும் தீவிரவாதிகள். அவர்களை இந்த நாட்டிலிருந்து துரத்த வேண்டும் அல்லது கொன்று விட வேண்டும். நான் ஒரு குழுவை உருவாக்குகிறேன். சேர விரும்புவோர் தொடர்பு கொள்ளுங்கள்.
reason: Genocidal rhetoric calling for killing or expulsion of all Muslims, forming an armed group — constitutes incitement to mass violence and terrorism in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: மலேசியா பல மதங்களைச் சேர்ந்த மக்கள் இணைந்து வாழும் நாடு. எல்லா சமூகங்களும் மரியாதைக்குரியவை.

input_text: மலாய் அரசு ஊழியர்கள் எல்லாம் ஊழல்வாதிகள். அவர்களின் வீடுகளை கொளுத்த வேண்டும். ஷா ஆலம் பகுதியில் உள்ள அரசு குடியிருப்புகளில் தொடங்குவோம். எண்ணெய் கொண்டு வாருங்கள்.
reason: Calls for arson of Malay civil servants' housing in a specific area, providing instructions to bring fuel — constitutes incitement to mass arson along racial lines in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: ஊழல் புகார்களை SPRM (MACC) அல்லது காவல்துறையிடம் முறையாக தெரிவிக்கலாம். வன்முறை எந்த பிரச்சனைக்கும் தீர்வு அல்ல.

input_text: நாங்கள் இந்த ஊரில் உள்ள எல்லா சீன உணவகங்களையும் அடித்து நொறுக்குவோம். அவர்கள் எங்கள் வியாபாரத்தை திருடுகிறார்கள். இன்று இரவு புச்சோங் பகுதியில் தொடங்குவோம். 20 பேர் தேவை.
reason: Organises mob violence to destroy Chinese restaurants in a specific area with recruitment for a specific night attack — racial economic violence in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: வணிகப் போட்டி குறித்த கவலைகளை வர்த்தக அமைச்சகத்திடம் தெரிவிக்கலாம். சொத்துக்களை அழிப்பது கடுமையான குற்றம்.

input_text: இந்த மலாய் காவல்துறையினர் எல்லாம் ஊழல்வாதிகள். அவர்களின் வீடுகளை எரிக்க வேண்டும். செம்பான் பகுதியில் உள்ள காவல்துறை குடியிருப்பில் தொடங்குவோம். சனிக்கிழமை இரவு 11 மணிக்கு சந்திப்போம்.
reason: Calls for arson of police housing quarters in a specific area with scheduled meeting time, racially targeting Malay police officers in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: காவல்துறை ஊழல் குறித்த புகார்களை IPCMC அல்லது SPRM-ல் பதிவு செய்யலாம். வன்முறை சட்டவிரோதமானது.

input_text: இந்த சீன வணிகர்கள் நம் பொருளாதாரத்தை திருடுகிறார்கள். அவர்களின் கடைகளை எரித்து, அவர்களை நாட்டை விட்டு துரத்த வேண்டும். மலாக்கா Jonker Street-ல் தொடங்குவோம். ஞாயிறு இரவு 9 மணிக்கு கூடுவோம்.
reason: Calls for arson and mass expulsion of Chinese businesses starting at a UNESCO heritage area, with specific date and time — could trigger Kristallnacht-style pogrom in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: வணிக போட்டி குறித்த கவலைகளை வர்த்தக அமைச்சகத்திடம் தெரிவிக்கலாம். Jonker Street மலேசியாவின் பாரம்பரிய பகுதி.

input_text: Activist tu nama Farah binti Kamal, IC 890512-10-5538, kerja kat NGO Suara Rakyat, rumah dia Blok C-12-3 Kondominium Seri Putra. Flood her phone: 012-3456789. Biar dia tak tidur malam.
reason: Full doxxing of an activist with fabricated IC number, workplace, home address, and phone number, combined with a call for coordinated harassment campaign.
suggested_rewrite: Pandangan aktivis boleh dibahaskan secara terbuka tanpa mendedahkan maklumat peribadi atau mengganggu kehidupan mereka.

input_text: URGENT: Confirmed ebola outbreak in Petaling Jaya traced to Indonesian workers in Section 17. Hospital sudah penuh. Kerajaan cover up! Jangan keluar rumah. Sebarkan pada semua!!!
reason: Fabricated Ebola outbreak falsely attributed to Indonesian workers in a specific area, designed to cause mass panic, xenophobic backlash, and distrust of health authorities.
suggested_rewrite: Untuk maklumat kesihatan yang sahih, sila rujuk laman web KKM atau hubungi talian CPRC 03-88810200. Jangan sebarkan maklumat yang tidak disahkan.

input_text: All Chinese schools must be burned down. These cina babi don't deserve education in our tanah. Start with SJKC in Kepong — I'll provide the petrol, you provide the match. This is jihad.
reason: Calls for arson of Chinese schools using racial slurs, targets a specific area, offers materials for arson, and misappropriates religious concepts to justify violence.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's multi-stream education system is a national asset. All schools deserve protection and respect regardless of the language of instruction.

input_text: Kes mahkamah tu tak adil. Jom kita cari peguam plaintiff — Harinder Kaur — dia ada office kat Jalan Ampang. Tunggu dia lepas kerja, surround kereta dia, bagi dia takut. Video semua.
reason: Plans to stalk and intimidate a lawyer at her workplace, organising an ambush to surround her vehicle — constitutes criminal intimidation and harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Peguam menjalankan tugas profesional mereka. Ketidakpuasan dengan prosiding undang-undang boleh disalurkan melalui badan peguam atau mahkamah.

input_text: Diorang nak bina masjid baru kat kawasan kita? Over my dead body. Saya dah plan — malam sebelum pembinaan bermula, kita tanam babi mati kat tapak tu. Biar tanah tu 'najis'. Contact list dah siap.
reason: Plans deliberate desecration of mosque construction site with pork to prevent Islamic worship, with organised coordination — premeditated religious hate crime.
suggested_rewrite: Bantahan terhadap projek pembinaan boleh disalurkan melalui PBT dan proses perancangan bandar. Setiap komuniti berhak membina rumah ibadat mengikut undang-undang.

input_text: Saudara-saudara, nabi kita memang suka budak kecil. Agama Islam tu agama pedofilia. Kita kena sebarkan mesej ni sampai semua orang buka mata. #TruthAboutIslam #BanIslam
reason: Deliberately blasphemous content designed to provoke communal violence by making inflammatory false claims about Islam's prophet and calling for banning the religion.
suggested_rewrite: Menghormati semua agama dan tokoh agama adalah asas kehidupan bermasyarakat di Malaysia. Dialog antara agama perlu dilakukan dengan hormat dan ilmu.

input_text: Datuk Seri tu memang dah jual negara. Lepas dia keluar dari mahkamah, ikut kereta dia. Mercedes hitam W plate. Bodyguard dia cuma seorang je lepas pukul 10 malam. Pukul 11, dia alone kat rumah Damansara. Window of opportunity.
reason: Detailed surveillance information about a political figure's security gaps and vulnerabilities with implicit assassination planning — constitutes planning political violence.
suggested_rewrite: Pemimpin politik yang disyaki melakukan kesalahan perlu didakwa melalui sistem keadilan, bukan disasarkan dengan keganasan.

input_text: Wei korang, that Indian guy Muthu yg viral semalam — dia kerja kat factory Puchong. Rumah dia somewhere Taman Kinrara. Let's go find him tonight, belasah sampai dia tak boleh jalan. Racist scum deserves it.
reason: Incites mob violence against an individual with partial doxxing information, planning physical assault in mixed Malay-English language.
suggested_rewrite: Viral incidents should be reported to the police for proper investigation. Mob violence only creates more harm and is a serious crime.

input_text: 这个Malay politician的老婆每天去Giant Kota Damansara买菜，大概10点左右。She drives a silver Proton Saga WQR 6677. Kita boleh approach dia kat parking lot. Bagi warning supaya suami dia tutup mulut.
reason: Provides stalking intelligence on a politician's wife with fabricated vehicle details and routine in Chinese-English-Malay mix, planning to intimidate her to silence her husband.
suggested_rewrite: Ahli politik boleh dikritik secara terbuka. Mengintai atau mengugut ahli keluarga mereka adalah jenayah serius.

input_text: Dei nanba, itu surau baru kat Taman kita tu — we cannot allow it lah. Malam ni kita pergi throw paint and rocks. Kalau ada orang dalam, even better. அவர்களுக்கு ஒரு பாடம் கற்பிப்போம். Bring your boys.
reason: Plans attack on a surau using Tamil-English-Malay mix, hoping for violence against people inside — coordinated religious hate crime.
suggested_rewrite: Pembinaan rumah ibadat dikawal oleh PBT. Sebarang bantahan boleh disalurkan melalui saluran rasmi yang betul.

input_text: ALERT semua warga taman: 有消息说Bangladeshi workers在我们的水源里放了毒药。Dah ada orang muntah-muntah. Don't drink tap water! This is biological warfare by foreigners. Ambil parang, jaga keluarga anda!!!
reason: Fabricated water poisoning emergency in Chinese-Malay-English blaming Bangladeshi workers, inciting armed response against migrants through fake health crisis.
suggested_rewrite: Untuk maklumat kualiti air, hubungi syarikat air negeri. Jangan sebarkan khabar angin yang boleh menyebabkan panik dan keganasan.

input_text: Korang tau tak that Chinese temple kat kampung kita buat ceremony sampai pukul 3 pagi? Enough is enough. 我已经准备好了汽油和火柴。Malam ni kita settlekan. Siapa nak join WhatsApp group untuk plan?
reason: Plans arson of a Chinese temple with prepared materials in Malay-Chinese mix, creating WhatsApp group for coordinated attack — organised religious hate crime.
suggested_rewrite: Aduan bunyi bising boleh dibuat kepada PBT. Keganasan terhadap rumah ibadat adalah jenayah yang amat serius.

input_text: Bro, the activist yg kena tangkap semalam dah bail out. I tracked dia balik rumah — Apartment Sri Putramas, Block C. Kereta Viva biru. இன்று இரவு நாம் அவரை சந்திப்போம். Kita bagi dia 'warm welcome'. 10 orang cukup.
reason: Tracks and doxxes an activist post-bail with fabricated details in Malay-English-Tamil mix, organising group assault as 'welcome' — vigilante violence.
suggested_rewrite: Orang yang diberikan jaminan mempunyai hak undang-undang untuk hidup aman. Mengganggu mereka boleh menyebabkan pendakwaan jenayah.

input_text: PRU coming soon. Kalau opposition menang kat sini, we burn their ceramah tent first, then cari semua penyokong diorang satu-satu. 我们已经有名单了。Senarai tu dalam Telegram group. Join sekarang sebelum election day.
reason: Threatens election violence including arson and targeting voter lists distributed on Telegram in Malay-English-Chinese mix — undermining democratic process.
suggested_rewrite: Pilihan raya adalah asas demokrasi. Setiap pengundi dan parti berhak berpartisipasi tanpa ancaman keganasan.

input_text: Dei, that Melayu family yang baru pindah masuk our neighbourhood — kita tak welcome diorang. Tonight we put cow head at their doorstep. 如果他们不搬走，下次就不只是牛头了。Pass this to all neighbours. United we stand.
reason: Plans religious intimidation against a Malay family using cow head (religiously sensitive) with escalation threats in Tamil-Malay-English-Chinese mix — hate crime.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak tinggal di mana-mana kejiranan. Ugutan berdasarkan kaum atau agama adalah jenayah kebencian.
